prompt: Construct a FitCommerce Operations & Inventory Suite supporting offline-first management for a fitness club that runs member-driven group-buy campaigns for gear and supplements while maintaining tight operational control. Roles include Administrator (system configuration and access control), Operations Manager (catalog, inventory, reporting), Procurement Specialist (suppliers and purchase orders), Coach (class readiness and limited reporting), and Member (browse items and join group-buys). The React web interface presents a dashboard KPI hub that summarizes member growth and churn, renewal rate, engagement, class fill rate, and coach productivity with time-based toggles (daily/weekly/monthly) and filters by location, coach, item category, and date range; access to each report is permissioned and exports generate downloadable CSV or PDF files with a timestamped naming convention. Item listing screens support multi-spec attributes such as category, brand, condition (new/open-box/used), refundable deposit (default $50.00, configurable per item), and billing model (one-time or monthly rental), along with available time windows (e.g., 03/27/2026 9:00 AM–5:00 PM) and inventory quantity; staff can save drafts, publish/unpublish, and batch-edit prices or availability with immediate inline validation feedback. Members can start or join a group-buy from an item detail view, see progress toward the minimum quantity, and receive clear on-screen outcomes for success or failure at the cutoff time; orders support notes and a visible operation timeline so staff can explain adjustments, splits, or cancellations without ambiguity.
